cases.title: Session of First Presbyterian Church, Stanley, NC v. Central Carolina Presbytery

parties.complainant_or_appellant: Session of First Presbyterian Church, Stanley, North Carolina

cases.synopsis: The Committee of Commissioners on Judicial Business recommended that the complaint of the Session of First Presbyterian Church, Stanley, NC, against Central Carolina Presbytery be found in order. A judicial commission was appointed to adjudicate the case at the Tenth General Assembly.
